sources.provider: Combating Terrorism Center at West Point - CTC Sentinel
sources.comment: CTC Sentinel is published as web pages; using the current issue/archive surface.

sources.provider: US Department of Homeland Security - News
sources.comment: DHS news on US homeland security threat assessments, border security and counter-terrorism operations for US partner context.

sources.provider: Office of the Director of National Intelligence - Press Releases
sources.comment: ODNI press releases for US national intelligence assessments and threats of relevance to UK-US Five Eyes partnership.

sources.provider: U.S. Department of Justice - National Security Division Press Releases
sources.comment: No consistently published RSS endpoint; using the NSD press release page and relying on keyword filtering.

sources.provider: George Washington University - Program on Extremism
sources.comment: GWU Program on Extremism research on domestic and transnational terrorist movements, prosecution data and case studies.
NSA press releases and cybersecurity advisories relevant to national security and state-sponsored threat actor activity.
RAND topic pages are HTML; using the terrorism topic index and relying on keyword filtering.

sources.provider: U.S. Department of State - Rewards for Justice
sources.comment: No RSS endpoint published; using the reward offers listing page.

sources.provider: National Consortium for the Study of Terrorism (START) - Big Allied and Dangerous (BAAD) Database
sources.comment: START BAAD database of designated terrorist organisations used for group identification context.
National Consortium for the Study of Terrorism (START) at University of Maryland publishes terrorism research and GTD data.

sources.provider: US State Department - Bureau of Counterterrorism
sources.comment: US State Dept Bureau of Counterterrorism for Foreign Terrorist Organisation designations and US CT policy updates.
